title: BPstat (Banco de Portugal) — Time-series for the Portuguese economy: GDP and main components of expenditure, quarterly since 1977
units: millions of euros (current prices and chain-linked volume), described in series metadata
license_terms: Banco de Portugal / BPstat open data API, free reuse with attribution
notes: Retrieved via BPstat public REST API (https://bpstat.bportugal.pt/api/) — domain_id=31 'Time-series for the Portuguese economy - GDP and main components of expenditure' contains 49 series (private/public consumption, investment, exports/imports, GDP, current prices and chain-linked volume, current and constant prices). All 49 series ids from this domain were pulled via the observations/csv endpoint. Discovered by probing REST endpoints (/api/domains, /api/series/?domain_ids=N, /api/observations/csv/?series_ids=...) after finding one example CSV-download URL via web search; this API is the modern successor exposing BdP's long-run 'séries longas' data programmatically.
